UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Joan's victory, the crowd's cheers, and the radiant triumphant face of our heroine.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the mud or the details of the banner embroidery as they are not central to the message of this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, major, triumphant, victorious, hopeful, steady, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the slipping laurels, uneasy daggers hint crowd, and Roman road sunset to convey a sense of pride turning into uncertainty and impending fall.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising Caesar's triumph or chariot as they are reversed, suggesting a decline rather than an ascendancy.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, contemplative, introspective, ethereal, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Beowulf's victory, his modesty amidst the praise, and the misty hall as a symbol of triumphant return.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the bloodied sword or arm injuries, focusing instead on Beowulf's strength and resilience.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, uplifting, triumphant, hopeful, anthemic, instrumental
